${modID}:RelicID.NAME: Good Relic
${modID}:RelicID.FLAVOR: Flavor text displayed in detailed relic view.
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain [E] at the start of your turn. [E] is an energy icon.

${modID}:inkTank.NAME: Ink Tank
${modID}:inkTank.FLAVOR: You never go anywhere without your trusty ink tank
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain 5 #y${modID}:Ink at the start of combat

${modID}:megaInkTank.NAME: Mega Ink Tank
${modID}:megaInkTank.FLAVOR: You never go anywhere without your trusty ink tank
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain 7 #y${modID}:Ink at the start of combat

${modID}:inkMotivator.NAME: Ink Motivator
${modID}:inkMotivator.FLAVOR: You have discovered how to get more Energy when using your ink frequently
DESCRIPTIONS: Gives 1 [E] when using 3 or more cards in one turn that use #y${modID}:Ink.

${modID}:refillSpecialist.NAME: Refill Specialist
${modID}:refillSpecialist.FLAVOR: You have discovered how to get more Energy when using your ink frequently
DESCRIPTIONS: Gives 1 ${modID}:Ink whenever using a card that gains ${modID}:Ink.

${modID}:inkSaver.NAME: Ink Saver
${modID}:inkSaver.FLAVOR: You have discovered how to get more Energy when using your ink frequently
DESCRIPTIONS: Gives 1 ${modID}:Ink whenever using a card that uses ${modID}:Ink.

${modID}:motivatedFlowState.NAME: Motivated Flow State
${modID}:motivatedFlowState.FLAVOR: You have discovered how to get more Energy when using your ink frequently
DESCRIPTIONS: Gives 1 Card whenever a flow state card is played.,

${modID}:ultimateWeapon.NAME: Ultimate weapon
${modID}:ultimateWeapon.FLAVOR: You have discovered how to get more Energy when using your ink frequently
DESCRIPTIONS: Every 2 attacks that are played one random card costs 0 [E] for this turn.

${modID}:inkVial.NAME: Ultimate weapon
${modID}:inkVial.FLAVOR: You have discovered how to get more Energy when using your ink frequently
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain 1 ${modID}:Ink at the start of combat.
